items.caption: A stylized, vector illustration of a medical certificate with handwritten text and a seal. the certificate is presented in a three-dimensional perspective, giving the impression of a physical document. the text is written in a cursive script, suggesting a personal or informal note. the seal is circular with a design that resembles a stylized letter 'm'. the background is a solid white color, emphasizing the certificate. the style of the image is clean and modern, with a focus on the certificate as the central subject.
